---
title: "Lecture 6: Factors, More `dplyr`"
date: 2025-07-15
summary: "Using Factors in R, Deep Dive into `dplyr`"
url_slides: 06-slides.qmd
url_code: csp-materials/factors-more-dplyr
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Code**: Copy and run in your console: `usethis::use_course("{< meta url_code >}")`

## Readings
